title: Milan Mashes to Big Stage Win in Tirreno, Del Toro Seals Overall Ahead of Jorgenson
content:
American rider Jorgenson leaps to second overall on last day of racing, while Jonathan Milan powers to big stage win.

Read the full article at Milan Mashes to Big Stage Win in Tirreno, Del Toro Seals Overall Ahead of Jorgenson on Velo.
author: sstokes
